title: chore(deps): update dependency autodll-webpack-plugin to v0.3.9 - autoclosed
body:
This Pull Request updates dependency [autodll-webpack-plugin](https://github.com/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin) from `v0.3.6` to `v0.3.9`

**Note**: This PR was created on a configured schedule ("every weekend" in timezone `Europe/Paris`) and will not receive updates outside those times.


<details>
<summary>Release Notes</summary>

### [`v0.3.7`](https://github.com/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/releases/0.3.7)

#### Bugfix
-  Prevented source maps from being injected into html #​91 @​WiseBird
####  Documentation
- Document **experimental** config option `inherit` #​92 @​sudo-suhas

---

### [`v0.3.8`](https://github.com/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/releases/0.3.8)

#### Bug fix
- Fix createMapper with inherit as plain object #​93 @​sudo-suhas

---

### [`v0.3.9`](https://github.com/asfktz/autodll-webpack-plugin/releases/0.3.9)

#### Bug fix
- No output file while using [chunkhash] in filename #​101 @​CJY0208 
#### Internal
- Remove `mkdirp`. #​96 @​wtgtybhertgeghgtwtg
- Replace `merge` utility with spread syntax. #​97 @​wtgtybhertgeghgtwtg
- Replace `concat` utility with spread syntax. #​98 @​wtgtybhertgeghgtwtg
- Replace `keys` utility and `lodash/keys` with `Object.keys`. #​100 @​wtgtybhertgeghgtwtg

---

</details>


<details>
